entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00129) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00129 TO HRACCESS INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO AUTHORIZE THE HRACCESS SYSTEM MIGRATION TASK ORDER VIA CLIN 6027 "HRACCESS SYSTEM MIGRATION DISCOVERY PHASE SUPPORT" AND CLIN 6027A "HRACCESS SYSTEM MIGRATION DISCOVERY PHASE SUPPORT - CONTINGENCY FUNDING."

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00130) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00130 TO THE HRACCESS INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO ADD CLIN 6027B "HRACCESS SYSTEM MIGRATION DISCOVERY PHASE SUPPORT" FOR ADDITIONAL LEVEL OF EFFORT ASSOCIATED WITH PROVIDING CSC AND HP VIRTUAL MACHINES." THIS WORK SHALL BE PERFORMED IN ACCORDANCE WITH SECTION 17.2.1 OF THE HRACCESS IDIQ STATEMENT OF WORK (SOW) IN SUPPORT OF THE HRACCESS SYSTEM MIGRATION DISCOVERY PHASE.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00131) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00131 TO THE HRACCESS IDIQ CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO EXERCISE SUB-CLINS 6004CA "ON-SITE: AIRPORT ASSESSMENT" AND 6016AA "PAYROLL ACTION PROCESSING (60,001 - 75,000)."

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00132 TO THE HRACCESS INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO DEFINITIZE THE FINGERPRINT SUBMISSION PORTAL WEB SERVICE INTEGRATION REQUIREMENTS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00133 TO THE HRACCESS INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS AUTHORIZE THE EXTENSION OF THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE (POP) FOR DISCOVERY SUPPORT PROVIDED BY LOCKHEED MARTIN UNDER TASK ORDER HSTS01-14-J-HRM092.

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00134) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00134 TO THE HRACCESS INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO CORRECT THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE (POP) FOR THE "FINGERPRINT SUBMISSION PORTAL (FSP) WEB SERVICE INTEGRATION," PROJECT REQUIREMENT.

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00135) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00135 TO THE HRACCESS INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS EXERCISE SUB-CLIN 6015AA "SF-52 AND BENEFITS PROCESSING (175,001 - 200,000)." FUNDING WILL BE PROVIDED VIA THE EXECUTION OF MODIFICATION P00009 TO THE OPTION YEAR 5 (OY 5) TASK ORDER HSTS01-14-J-HRM025.

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00137) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00137 TO THE HRACCESS IDIQ CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO AUTHORIZE WORK UNDER CLINS 6004BB "POST AIRPORT ASSESSMENT" AND 6006AA "MEDICAL PROCESSING (15,001 - 20,000)." MODIFICATION P00137 ALSO MAKE AN ADMINISTRATIVE CHANGE TO THE CONTRACT AND AUTHORIZE WORK UNDER NEWLY CREATED CLINS 6005AD "BACKGROUND CHECK (40,001 - 45,500)" AND 6015AE "SF-52&BENEFITS PROCESSING" TO COVER TRANSACTIONS FOR THE REMAINDER OF OPTION YEAR (OY) 5. FUNDING WILL BE PROVIDED VIA THE EXECUTION OF MODIFICATION P00011 TO THE OY 5 TASK ORDER HSTS01-14-J-HRM025.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
